Recently there was a bug where I couldn't pick stuff up, but now I can do everything the game has to offer! This review used to be 1 star. 

*IF THIS HAPPENS TO YOU*

go into quick settings, go into settings on the top right corner, find the setting "Storage", then go to chemp physics, then click the button NEXT TO CHEMP PHYSICS that says Delete Data luckily, all to do in the game to get your progress back is put your color back, then start playing again!
There's nobody on most of the time. So if you're fine with being alone and probably scared then play on.
